response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is primarily in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software engineering experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical leadership
Demonstrated ability to build and optimize high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or hardware architecture modeling experience
Lacks exposure to AI accelerator optimization, GPU workloads, or deep-learning performance analysis
Educational background is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience
